name: Korean Language
description: Master Korean language skills including reading comprehension, grammar, and writing
description_ko: 독해, 문법, 작문을 포함한 국어 능력 마스터

name: Mathematics
description: Learn mathematical concepts from basic arithmetic to advanced calculus
description_ko: 기본 산술에서 고급 미적분학까지 수학 개념 학습

name: English
description: Improve English reading, writing, listening, and speaking skills
description_ko: 영어 읽기, 쓰기, 듣기, 말하기 능력 향상

name: Social Studies
description: Explore history, geography, economics, and political science
description_ko: 역사, 지리, 경제, 정치 과학 탐구

name: Science
description: Study physics, chemistry, biology, and earth science
description_ko: 물리학, 화학, 생물학, 지구 과학 공부

name: Korean History
description: Learn about Korean history from ancient times to modern era
